---
title: "Tutorials"
subtitle: "Task-focused guides for fMRI modeling workflows."
---

These guides port the `fmrireg` vignette set into Python/Quarto with cleaner
topic filenames and examples that run against `fmrimod`.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Overview and workflow](overview-workflow.qmd)
Walk through the modeling stack: sampling frames, HRFs, event models, baseline
terms, GLM fitting, acceleration, and group summaries.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Build a design matrix](design-matrices.qmd)
Create condition-specific HRF regressors from an event table and inspect the
resulting column metadata.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Contrasts](contrasts.qmd)
Create named contrast vectors from model columns and use factorial contrast
generators for main effects and interactions.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Simulation](simulation.qmd)
Generate clean BOLD responses, fMRI-like noise, and matrix time series for
method checks.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Linear model](linear-model.qmd)
Fit a small GLM, inspect beta and t-statistic matrices, and compute a manual
contrast.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Datasets](datasets.qmd)
Represent in-memory and latent data with sampling frames and event tables.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Group analysis](group-analysis.qmd)
Fit feature-wise fixed/random-effects meta-regression from beta and variance
matrices.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Functional connectivity](functional-connectivity.qmd)
Estimate seed-to-target correlations and transform them with Fisher z helpers.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Sketched and AR-aware models](sketched-ar-models.qmd)
Use low-rank GLM sketches and residual autocorrelation diagnostics for large
or temporally correlated data.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Plugin development](plugin-development.qmd)
Register custom bases and sketch the engine extension contract.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Benchmark datasets](benchmark-datasets.qmd)
Load deterministic fixtures, build design matrices, and score estimated
condition betas.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [API reference](../reference/index.qmd)
Look up the main event, HRF, contrast, GLM, and single-trial APIs generated
from Python docstrings.
:::
:::

:::
